element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player must select 1-4 champions from 24 frozen options before progressing past first section
Active Time Battle-style real-time system contrasting with traditional turn-based RPGs
Sound effects indicate nearby creatures; immersion mechanic
Players learn sequences of runes (e.g., fire + wing = fireball); skill-based progression
Mouse-based clicking in first-person view to interact with dungeon elements
Primitive dynamic lighting for immersion and spatial orientation
Character skills improve directly via use; eschews abstract D&D-style experience points
Primary goal: find Librasulus' firestaff to defeat Lord Chaos
Ultimate threat requiring firestaff to defeat; alternative ending if firestaff obtained but dungeon exited without victory

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Real-time combat with audio cues creates punctuated tension cycles; exploration phases allow relief and skill development between encounters

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gated by champion selection requirement; introductory combat with weak creatures; skill system allows organic difficulty scaling
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Real-time combat escalates; rune spell sequences require mastery; multiple champion management increases complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Firestaff acquisition and Lord Chaos encounter; high-stakes decision point (defeat boss vs. exit dungeon)
notable_spikes: First encounter with real-time combat system
Complex spell sequences requiring rune memorization

notable_level_patterns.description: First section acts as tutorial/selection hub with 24 frozen champions in mirrors; player must select 1-4 champions to progress
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Opening dungeon section / Theron's initial chamber

notable_level_patterns.description: Hybrid 2D/3D rendering creates illusion of 3D space; encourages spatial navigation and environmental awareness
Combat encounters use real-time mechanics with audio cues signaling creature proximity; contrasts with exploration calm
Two endings available: defeat Lord Chaos with firestaff (true ending) or exit dungeon with firestaff (alternate ending)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Final dungeon section / Lord Chaos chamber
